raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is exposed on its left and right sides while resting on top of box_2. There is at least 10 cm of lateral clearance on both sides so the robot can insert its two end-effectors midway up the box without striking box_2 or the tabletop. The frictional attachment between box_1 and box_2 is weak enough to be overcome by a gentle, vertically directed lifting force.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors press laterally against the opposite sides of box_1, squeeze to generate frictional grip, and then lift the box a few centimeters upward. Box_1 is now securely held above the tabletop by the robot, fully separated from box_2."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is exposed on its left and right sides while resting on top of box_2. There is at least 10 cm of lateral clearance on both sides so the robot can insert its two end-effectors midway up the box without striking box_2 or the tabletop. The frictional attachment between box_1 and box_2 is weak enough to be overcome by a gentle, vertically directed lifting force.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors press laterally against the opposite sides of box_1, squeeze to generate frictional grip, and then lift the box a few centimeters upward. Box_1 is now securely held above the tabletop by the robot, fully separated from box_2.
